Precondition: Box_1 is on top of box_2 and both end-effectors are free.
The robot holds box_1 with both end-effectors and the table area left of box_2 is clear.
Postcondition: Box_1 is placed on the table left of box_2 and both end-effectors are free.

Precondition: Box_2 is accessible and both end-effectors are free.
